<!--
Global Copilot instructions - loads automatically for all files.
Points to comprehensive docs rather than duplicating content here.
-->

All project conventions, commands, architecture, and workflows are documented in
`AI_DEVELOPMENT.md` at the repository root. Always read and follow that file. If any instruction
here conflicts with `AI_DEVELOPMENT.md`, the `AI_DEVELOPMENT.md` version takes precedence.

Also read `AGENT_LESSONS.md` to learn from prior troubleshooting and avoid focusing on small fixes over holistic solutions.

When creating PRs, follow the format in `.github/pull_request_template.md` for consistent descriptions.

<!-- PR formatting standards below -->

Use Oxford commas only when necessary for clarity.
Do not end bullets with periods unless they are multi-sentence bullets (and they should very rarely be so).
For PR auto-summaries, keep your topline summary at the start simple and direct, ready to be read by developers and designers.
For PR auto-summaries, do not include footnotes and footnote links.
For PR auto-summaries, do not include a secondary summarization at the bottom after the list of work.
For PR auto-summaries, put all existing work under a `## Work` header and have it be one bullet list with sub-bullets rather than a verbose subhead mechanism and lists. Bold any parent bullets that act like subheadings in the bullet list tree.
